title: Government Contracts Scraper Input
description: Search federal contract opportunities and awards from SAM.gov. Requires a free SAM.gov public API key.

apiKey.sectionDescription: A free SAM.gov public API key is required. Register at https://sam.gov and get your key from Account Details > Public API Key.
apiKey.title: SAM.gov API Key
apiKey.description: Your SAM.gov public API key. Get one free at https://sam.gov (Account Details page).

mode.sectionDescription: Choose what type of data to search for.
mode.title: Scraping mode
mode.description: What type of government contract data to search for.

keyword.sectionDescription: Filter opportunities and awards by keyword, NAICS code, agency, set-aside type, and more.
keyword.title: Keyword
keyword.description: Search keyword to find in opportunity titles and descriptions.

solicitationNumber.title: Solicitation number
solicitationNumber.description: Search by a specific solicitation number.

procurementType.title: Procurement type
procurementType.description: Filter by procurement type. Leave empty for all types.

naicsCode.title: NAICS code
naicsCode.description: Filter by NAICS code (up to 6 digits). Example: 541512 (Computer Systems Design Services).

classificationCode.title: Classification / PSC code
classificationCode.description: Filter by Product Service Code (PSC). Example: 7030 (ADP Software).

setAside.title: Set-aside type
setAside.description: Filter by small business set-aside type.

state.title: Place of performance (state)
state.description: Filter by state where work will be performed. Use 2-letter state code (e.g. VA, CA, TX).

zip.title: Place of performance (ZIP)
zip.description: Filter by ZIP code where work will be performed.

organizationCode.title: Agency / Organization code
organizationCode.description: Filter by federal organization code. Use Entity Lookup mode to find codes.

postedFrom.title: Posted from date
postedFrom.description: Start date for posting range (MM/dd/yyyy). Defaults to 30 days ago.

postedTo.title: Posted to date
postedTo.description: End date for posting range (MM/dd/yyyy). Defaults to today.

responseDeadlineFrom.title: Response deadline from
responseDeadlineFrom.description: Filter opportunities with response deadlines starting from this date (MM/dd/yyyy).

responseDeadlineTo.title: Response deadline to
responseDeadlineTo.description: Filter opportunities with response deadlines up to this date (MM/dd/yyyy).

organizationName.sectionDescription: Look up federal organizations. Used when mode is 'Entity Lookup'.
organizationName.title: Organization name
organizationName.description: Search for federal organizations by name (e.g. 'Department of Defense').

maxResults.title: Max results
maxResults.description: Maximum number of results to return. Free users are limited to 25 results per run.
